title: Version 2.0.20 Changelog
items: Fix upload rejecting file names with embedded '..'
Fix OnlyOffice callback rejected by CSRF middleware
Fix CSP race condition OnlyOffice origin cache at startup
Fix image viewer zoom focusing on the wrong point
Guard folder listing against out-of-order responses
Destroy OnlyOffice editor on document switch or close
Latch downloadFiles on a ref to prevent duplicate downloads
Clear image src when revoking blob URL in useImageBlob
